about.title: About
about.name: PathShortener
about.description: Extracts archives and organizes folders on Windows, shortening names in advance so that every path fits the length limit (259 characters by default). A local AI model suggests name semantics, while deterministic code controls the budget, collisions and the mapping log.
about.features: Features: ZIP/7z/RAR archives · folders (in place or copy) · date protection in names · dictionary of established abbreviations · pattern cache · CSV log for reversibility · Ollama model selection · light and dark themes · Ukrainian and English languages.
about.author: Author: Bilyk Ihor (Білик Ігор)
about.license: License: MIT — free use, copying, modification and distribution provided the copyright notice is kept. Full text in the LICENSE file.
